overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city center. The camera moves through towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements, crosses a busy intersection, and walks alongside vehicle traffic on wet reflective streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon canyon between towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements

events.description: camera pans down from skyscrapers to street level and begins walking forward

agents.ego_description: looking up at towering neon advertisements then beginning to walk along the wet reflective sidewalk

towering structure with multiple illuminated advertisement screens
large pink glowing hotel sign mounted on building facade
elevated walkway connecting buildings with digital billboards underneath
tall modern street lamp illuminating the wet pavement below

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a dramatic upward view of towering cyberpunk skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements and holographic displays. The camera pans down to street level revealing a wet reflective sidewalk and begins walking forward through the neon canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk approaching busy intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: approaching crosswalk with pedestrians waiting at the corner
stepping onto the yellow-striped crosswalk to cross the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk and stepping onto the crosswalk with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: adult with child waiting at the crosswalk corner
group of pedestrians crossing the street together

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes and green walk signal projection
tall pole with traffic signals and attached digital advertisement screens
tall vertical digital screen displaying animated advertisements

segments.scene_description: Walking along the wet sidewalk toward a busy intersection, the scene reveals more pedestrians gathering at the crosswalk. The camera approaches the yellow-striped crosswalk and begins crossing with a group of pedestrians while futuristic vehicles wait at the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with holographic advertisements and vehicle traffic

events.description: futuristic vehicles begin moving through the intersection
finishing crossing and turning to walk along the street edge

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection and continuing along the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: black futuristic sedan driving through the intersection
pedestrian with distinctive green hair walking past the camera

entered.detail: tall cylindrical column displaying rotating holographic advertisements
green painted metal barrier separating sidewalk from street
sleek black sedan with illuminated accents driving on the road

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the wide intersection as futuristic vehicles begin passing by. After crossing, the perspective shifts to walk along the street edge, passing a pedestrian with green hair while various cars drive past on the wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: street edge with moving traffic and neon billboards

events.description: blue compact van passes by closely on the right side
gold luxury sedan and other vehicles pass by on the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the street edge alongside moving traffic

notable_agents.action: blue compact van driving past the camera on the wet road
gold luxury sedan with glowing trim driving down the street

entered.detail: boxy blue van with headlights illuminating the wet pavement
long gold-colored car with distinctive rear lighting
tall vertical banner with illuminated character advertisement

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows continuous walking along the street edge with moderate traffic passing by. A distinctive blue van and later a gold sedan drive past on the wet road, while neon advertisements continue to illuminate the hazy night atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a towering vertical perspective of a neon skyline down to a street-level walk through a bustling futuristic intersection. It begins with a dramatic upward view of skyscrapers draped in holographic advertisements before panning down to a wet, reflective sidewalk and moving forward into the neon canyon. As the camera approaches a busy crosswalk, the scene shifts to follow a group of pedestrians crossing the yellow-striped street while futuristic vehicles wait. The perspective then transitions to the street edge, passing a pedestrian with green hair as traffic begins to flow across the damp asphalt. Finally, the movement continues along the roadside, passing a blue van and a gold sedan under the glow of hazy neon lights that illuminate the night atmosphere.
